name: Mass Healing Word
description:
Up to six creatures of your choice that you can see within range regain Hit Points equal to 2d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The healing increases by 1d4 for each spell slot level above 3.
summary: Up to six creatures of your choice that you can see within range regain Hit Points equal to 2d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.
notes: Imported from dndbeyond_spells_with_sources_v23_final_balanced.csv. Full homebrew spell metadata is preserved in metadata.
